name: FdDate
description:
FdDate class is used to represent date and time.

It's a simplified analog of native Date instance.
It gives some convenience methods to work with date or time data.

methods.name: getDayOfWeek
methods.description: Get number of weekday ex. Sunday = 1, Monday = 2, Tuesday = 3 etc.

methods.name: isDateValid
methods.description: Method that checks validity of current FdDate instance.

methods.name: setTime
methods.signature: (hour: number, minute?: number, second?: number) => FdDate
methods.description: Set hour, minute and second data

methods.name: toDate
methods.description: Get native date object from FdDate.

methods.name: toDateString
methods.description: Get date string in yyyy-mm-dd format

methods.name: toString
methods.description: Get string representation in yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss format

methods.name: toTimeString
methods.description: Get time string in hh:mm:ss format

methods.name: valueOf
methods.description:
The valueOf() method returns the primitive value of a FdDate.
Returns: The number of milliseconds between 1 January 1970 00:00:00 UTC and the given date.

methods.name: getFdDateByDate
methods.description: Convert js date object to FdDate model

methods.name: getNow
methods.description: Create FdDate instance of the current moment

methods.name: getToday
methods.description: Gets today's FdDate where hour, minute and second is set to 0
